Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "LUNARCITY-C000-0810" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Lunar City (TND - 2023).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C000 to set the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) before starting the game to disable highscore loading and saving to disk.
